page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c5.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing a total of 8 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core allocation. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a moderate multi-core capability alongside weaker single-core metrics. The stress-ng multi-core CPU performance is rated as average at 5887.86, while the single-core score of 1103.39 falls into the lower tier. Memory bandwidth is stable, with cached small-block reads reaching 328.74 GB/sec and uncached large-block writes at 35.09 GB/sec. However, tasks like single-threaded gzip compression and Geekbench multi-core compiling show weaker performance profiles.

Given its compute-oriented 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance offers a structured resource profile for workloads that require predictable CPU access without massive memory footprints. It is suitable for moderate multi-threaded processing, basic web serving, and lightweight containerized applications. However, the lack of local storage and lower single-core performance make it less optimal for high-performance databases or heavy single-threaded execution.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c5.2xlarge is a compute-optimized x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz and 16.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps but contains no local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmarks show average multi-core CPU performance and stable memory bandwidth, though single-core execution and database operations trend lower. With its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this server is qualitatively cost-efficient for dedicated compute tasks that do not require high memory density. It is best suited for moderate multi-threaded workloads, lightweight web serving, and basic containerized applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c5.2xlarge is a compute-optimized server with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for moderate multi-threaded workloads without local storage.

tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance featuring eight physical cores and a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio for predictable multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs with 1 thread per core
16.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on KVM hypervisor
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Suitable for moderate multi-threaded processing and web serving
